svg.title: MQ_Quad 40-pin header — GPIO / wPi mapping

g.text: Raw output rendered as a schematic — left column = odd pins, right column = even pins.

svg.text: GPIO = Linux gpiochip number · wPi = WiringPi number (pinMode arg) · MODE = pin state at gpio readall time
V column and repeated header rows omitted from this diagram — full raw output is under <details> in the README.
